description: Initial screen state: Askable dashboard showing a list of studies in a table format.
frame_description: The Askable dashboard is visible with a sidebar on the left and a main table listing various studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, and dates.

description: User clicks the '+ Create' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the '+ Create' button in the top right corner of the studies list.

description: A dropdown menu appears showing different study types like 'Interview study', 'Unmoderated study', and 'Participant recruitment'.
frame_description: A menu has opened below the '+ Create' button, listing several research study options.

description: User hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the 'Interview study' item in the dropdown menu.

description: User clicks on 'Interview study'.
frame_description: The 'Interview study' menu item is highlighted as the user clicks it.

description: Page navigates to the study setup screen.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the studies list to a new form-based page for study setup.

description: User clicks into the 'Study title' input field and selects the default text.
frame_description: The text 'Askable Product Team - 026 - 12 participants' in the title field is highlighted.

description: User deletes the default study title and types 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.
frame_description: The title field is cleared and then the new text 'TV Streaming - Discovery' is entered character by character.

description: Click the 'Next' button to proceed from the study title step.
frame_description: The user is on the first step of the study setup, having entered a title for the study.

description: A loading animation appears while the next step is being prepared.
frame_description: A pink loading dot animation is visible on a white background.

description: Navigation to the 'Research method' step of the study setup.
frame_description: The 'Research method' page is displayed, showing various moderated and unmoderated research options.

description: Hover over the 'Video Call' research method option.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Video Call' card on the Research method page.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the Research method page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button at the bottom of the page.

description: Loading animation appears.
frame_description: Pink loading dot animation.

description: Navigation to the 'Device' step.
frame_description: The 'Device' step is displayed, with 'Any device' selected by default.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the Device page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.

description: Loading animation appears.
frame_description: Pink loading dot animation.

description: Navigation to the 'Tool' step.
frame_description: The 'Tool' step is displayed, showing the Askable tool as the recommended option.

description: Click the 'I want to use a third party tool' link.
interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool
frame_description: The user clicks the link below the main tool description.

description: The list of third-party tool options appears on the page.
frame_description: A section titled 'Third party software' appears with icons for Zoom, Lookback, Microsoft Teams, etc.

description: User scrolls down to see more third-party tool options.
frame_description: The page content scrolls vertically.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the Tool page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.

description: Loading animation appears.
frame_description: Pink loading dot animation.

description: Navigation to the 'Quota' step.
frame_description: The 'Quota' step is displayed, asking for the number of participants.

description: Change the number of participants from 12 to 5.
frame_description: The user types '5' into the numeric input field.

description: User pauses before proceeding to the next step.
frame_description: The screen remains static on the Quota page.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the Quota page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.

description: Loading animation appears.
frame_description: Pink loading dot animation.

description: Navigation to the 'Session format' step.
frame_description: The 'Session format' step is displayed with options for Individual Interviews or Focus Groups.

description: Hover over the 'Individual Interviews' session format option.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the 'Individual Interviews' card.

description: Click the 'Next' button on the Session format page.
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button.

description: Loading animation appears.
frame_description: Pink loading dot animation.

description: Navigation to the 'Session duration' step.
frame_description: The 'Session duration' step is displayed with a dropdown menu.

description: Navigation to the 'Participant selection' step.
frame_description: The 'Participant selection' step is displayed with 'Hand picking' and 'Automated' options.

description: User hovers over the 'Hand picking' option.
frame_description: Participant selection page with two options: Hand picking and Automated.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Participant selection page.

description: Page navigates to the Audience Panel selection step.
frame_description: Audience Panel selection page.

description: User hovers over the 'Askable Panel' option.
frame_description: Audience Panel selection page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Audience Panel selection page.

description: Page navigates to the Participant location step.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User types 'Australia' into the location input field.
interaction_target: Type to add more participant locations
frame_description: Participant location page with text being entered.

description: User selects 'Australia' from the location suggestions.
frame_description: Participant location page with dropdown open.

description: The UI updates to show a map of Australia.
frame_description: Participant location page with map visible.

description: User selects 'United States' from the location suggestions.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: The UI updates to show a map including the United States.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User clicks the 'Delete' button for the Australia location.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: Australia is removed from the selected locations.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: Page navigates to the Demographic filters step.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: User clicks the 'Exclude people you've already spoken to' dropdown.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: The exclusion period dropdown menu opens.
frame_description: Demographic filters page with dropdown open.

description: User selects 'Don't exclude anyone' from the dropdown.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: Page navigates to the Custom screener step.
frame_description: Custom screener page.

description: User clicks the 'Add a custom screener question' button.
frame_description: Custom screener page.

description: The question type selection menu appears.
frame_description: Custom screener page with menu open.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the question type menu.
frame_description: Custom screener page.

description: User navigates back to the Participant location step.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User types 'United states' into the location input field.
interaction_target: Type to add more participant locations
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User selects 'United States' from the location suggestions.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User clicks the 'Delete' button for the Australia location.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Participant location page.

description: Page navigates to the Demographic filters step.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: User clicks the 'Exclude people you've already spoken to' dropdown.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: User selects 'Don't exclude anyone' from the dropdown.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button.
frame_description: Demographic filters page.

description: Page navigates to the Custom screener step.
frame_description: Custom screener page.

description: User clicks the 'Add a custom screener question' button.
frame_description: Custom screener page.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the question type menu.
frame_description: Custom screener page.

description: Multiple Choice question configuration modal appears
frame_description: A modal titled 'Multiple Choice' is now visible over the main page content.

description: Type the screener question: 'Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?'
frame_description: The user is typing into the 'Screener question' field within the modal.

description: Type the first answer option: 'I don't use them at all'
frame_description: The user is typing the first answer option in the modal.

description: Type the second answer option: 'I use them a few times per week'
frame_description: The user is typing the second answer option in the modal.

description: Type the third answer option: 'I use them daily'
frame_description: The user is typing the third answer option in the modal.

description: Type the fourth answer option: 'I use them multiple times per day'
frame_description: The user is typing the fourth answer option in the modal.

description: Click the 'Save' button in the modal
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Save' button in the bottom right corner of the modal.

description: Modal closes and question is added to the screener list
frame_description: The modal has disappeared, and the question is now visible on the 'Custom screener' page.

description: Click the 'Next' button
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Next' button below the screener question list.

description: Navigate to the 'Your Timezone' page
frame_description: The page content has changed to show the 'Your Timezone' configuration.

description: Hover over the timezone selection dropdown
frame_description: The cursor is stationary over the timezone dropdown field.

description: Click on 'Audience' in the sidebar
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Audience' link in the navigation sidebar.

description: Navigate back to the 'Custom screener' page
frame_description: The page content has returned to the 'Custom screener' section.

description: Click '+ Add another custom question'
frame_description: The user clicks the button to add a new question.

description: Question type selection menu appears
frame_description: A small menu with options like 'Multiple choice' and 'Short answer' is visible.

description: Click 'Copy from other study' in the menu
frame_description: The user selects the 'Copy from other study' option.

description: Copy study modal appears with loading state
frame_description: A new modal is visible with a loading animation in the center.

description: Study list loads in the modal
frame_description: The modal now shows a list of studies with their status, date, and researcher.

description: Click the close button on the modal
frame_description: The user clicks the 'X' icon in the top right of the modal.

description: Copy study modal closes
frame_description: The modal has disappeared.

description: Click '+ Add another custom question' again
frame_description: The user clicks the add question button once more.

description: Question type selection menu appears
frame_description: The menu with question types is visible.

description: User hovers over the 'Short answer' option in the question type menu.
frame_description: The 'Custom screener' page is visible with a menu open under '+ Add another custom question'.

description: User types 'What is the name of your favourite TV show that you're watching right now?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is entering text into the question field in the modal.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the green Save button at the bottom right of the modal.

description: The modal closes and the question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, and the new question is now visible in the custom screener list.

description: User hovers over the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the button to add a new question.

description: User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the button to expand the question type menu.

description: The question type menu appears.
frame_description: A small menu with options like 'Multiple choice' and 'Short answer' is displayed.

description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on the 'Multiple choice' option.

description: The 'Multiple Choice' modal appears.
frame_description: A modal window for creating a multiple choice question is now visible.

description: User types 'Which TV streaming service are you using most right now?' into the screener question field.
frame_description: The user is entering the question text in the modal.

description: User hovers over the first answer field.
frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the first answer input field.

description: User types 'Netflix' into the first answer field.
frame_description: The text 'Netflix' appears in the first answer field.

description: User types 'Disney+' into the third answer field.
frame_description: The text 'Disney+' appears in the third answer field.

description: User clicks the eligible checkmark for Netflix.
frame_description: The user toggles the eligibility status for the first answer.

description: User types 'Prime Video' into the fourth answer field.
frame_description: The text 'Prime Video' appears in the fourth answer field.

description: User clicks the eligible checkmark for Prime Video.
frame_description: The user interacts with the eligibility icon for the fourth answer.

description: Click on the 'Next' button to proceed from the Custom screener section.
frame_description: The user is on the Custom screener page, which shows three multi-choice and short answer questions.

description: Navigation to the 'Your Timezone' section of the study setup.
frame_description: The UI transitions to show the 'Your Timezone' section with a dropdown for selecting the timezone.

description: User clicks the 'Save' button.
frame_description: The user clicks the green Save button in the modal.

description: The modal closes and the question is added to the screener list.
frame_description: The modal disappears, and both new questions are now visible in the list.

description: Page navigates to the Additional Info section.
frame_description: The screen transitions to the 'Additional Info' page, showing timezone settings.

description: User types 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' into the 'Short description of who you're looking for' field.
interaction_target: Short description of who you're looking for (Required)
frame_description: The user is entering text into the first text area on the Description page.

description: Click on the 'Next' button in the Description section.
frame_description: The Description page is shown with the short description field populated.

description: Navigation to the 'Additional instructions' section of the study setup.
frame_description: The UI transitions to the 'Additional instructions' section.

description: Click on the 'Next' button in the Additional instructions section.
frame_description: The 'Additional instructions' section is visible with an 'Add additional instructions' button.

description: Navigation to the 'Contacts' section of the study setup.
frame_description: The UI transitions to the 'Contacts' section, showing the organizer and facilitator details.

description: Click on the 'Next' button in the Legal & privacy section.
frame_description: The 'Legal & privacy' section is visible with 'Use Askable's standard Terms and Conditions' selected.

description: Navigation to the 'Session Times' section of the study setup.
frame_description: The UI transitions to the 'Session Times' section, displaying a weekly calendar view.

description: Click on the calendar to add a session at 9:00 AM on Wednesday, February 25th.
frame_description: The user is interacting with the calendar grid to schedule sessions.

description: Click on the calendar to add a session at 11:00 AM on Wednesday, February 25th.
frame_description: The user continues to add sessions to the calendar.

description: Click on the calendar to add a session at 1:00 PM on Thursday, February 26th.
frame_description: The user continues to add sessions to the calendar.

description: Click on the calendar to add a session at 9:00 AM on Friday, February 27th.
frame_description: The user continues to add sessions to the calendar.

description: Click on the calendar to add a session at 11:00 AM on Friday, February 27th.
frame_description: The user continues to add sessions to the calendar.

description: Click on the calendar to add a session at 1:00 PM on Friday, February 27th.
frame_description: The user continues to add sessions to the calendar.

description: Click on the 'Next' button in the Session Times section.
frame_description: The calendar is shown with multiple scheduled sessions across three days.

description: Navigation to the 'Review & Submit' section of the study setup.
frame_description: The UI transitions to the final review page, showing a summary of the study details.

description: Click on the 'Submit study' button.
frame_description: The user is at the bottom of the Review & Submit page.

description: Navigation to the 'All participants' page after study submission.
frame_description: The page loads an empty list of participants with a message stating the study is currently in review.

description: Click on the 'Settings' tab in the study navigation.
frame_description: The user is viewing the participants list and clicks on the Settings link in the header.

description: Navigation to the study settings page.
frame_description: The study settings page loads, showing various configuration sections like Study setup, Audience, and Additional info.

description: User scrolls down the study settings page.
frame_description: The user is scrolling through the settings page, passing the Audience and Additional info sections.
